creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #3)

Some dependencies are failing to build with the new version.
I agree that hdf5-112 for 1.12 series is needed for now.

Additionally, the SZIP option is broken - hdf5 fails to find the libaec library.
This is a pre-existing condition and is caused by the hdf5 upstream problem.
It is also broken in the port now.
See here: https://github.com/HDFGroup/hdf5/issues/4949
